selection_source.selection_rule: First candidate from Japanese island-name query where class=place and type=island. This is an algorithmic island-proxy rule, not a human-verified study locality or an island polygon.

boundary: Proxy points are used only for environment and geographic-distance sensitivity analyses. They must never be substituted for the historical plant sampling localities or used to calculate a population trait mean.

points.source_query: 伊豆大島, 東京都, 日本
利島, 東京都, 日本
新島, 東京都, 日本
神津島, 東京都, 日本
三宅島, 東京都, 日本
